source_jobs.title: Tech Lead (Node&React) - Türkiye
source_jobs.description:
* The position is fully remote and is open for Engineers based in Türkiye

* The position is for a B2B/freelancing cooperation and it is a long-term contract engagement




ABOUT US

We are a leading product development partner specializing in custom web and mobile application development. With Silicon Valley founders and top-tier European tech talent, we operate from Prague and have successfully delivered over 65 software products for early-stage startups, scaleups, and global enterprises.

 - Founded in 2016

 - Headquartered in Prague

 - Built and launched 65+ products

 - 85+ team members

 - Driving product innovation for leading US companies

At OAK’S LAB, we take an AI-first approach, utilizing AI on almost every project. From streamlining design and testing workflows to enhancing developer productivity, our teams leverage tools such as Figma MCP Server, Playwright MCP Server, and Cursor, and we’re actively experimenting with remote AI agents to push the boundaries of what’s possible in product development.




OUR PROJECTS

Here are a few from our portfolio:

 - Nasdaq Private Market (Series C, Cybersecurity)- nasdaqprivatemarket.com http://nasdaqprivatemarket.com

 - Blackpoint Cyber (Series B, Finance) - blackpointcyber.com http://blackpointcyber.com

 - OpenLoop (Series A, Healthcare) - openloophealth.com http://openloophealth.com




THE ROLE

Our product development team is looking for an experienced Tech Lead who combines creative thinking, exceptional problem-solving skills, and technical expertise to own the technical buildout of the product. On each of our products, we have a dedicated team that is led by a Tech Lead, a Product Manager, and a Design Lead. Our teams are small and effective and range from 5 to 15 people.

This role requires a combination of strong technical and leadership capabilities. You’ll be responsible for managing an engineering team (usually 3-7 engineers), owning the software architecture and infrastructure, engaging with the business to understand the product needs, and overseeing the technical direction and delivery.

You’ll get support and guidance from our Head of Engineering and will also be part of our Engineering Leads Council, where we consult on large technical challenges and tech-related decisions that shape the startups we build. You’ll also have the opportunity to join our internal AI Guild, a community where engineers share insights, experiment with cutting-edge AI tools, and learn from one another.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Leadership

 - Collaborate with the Product Manager and Design Lead to align on the project’s goals and ensure the delivery of a seamless, performant front-end experience.

 - Lead, mentor, and manage a team of engineers, fostering a collaborative and high-performing team culture

 - Create and maintain an environment where your engineers are motivated, engaged, and constantly improving their skills.

Development

 - Own the technical delivery of the project, ensuring deadlines are met and deliverables align with the client's objectives.

 - Select and update technologies that are most appropriate for the client's needs, ensuring they align with our standards

 - Assist the Product Manager in discovery refinement, ensuring that epics and user stories in the roadmap are refined, estimated, and prioritized in line with business goals

 - Be a hands-on contributor to the project, developing features together with the team

 - Conduct regular code reviews to maintain code quality

 - Oversee the overall software architecture

 - Proactively seek ways to improve the development process and team efficiency



SKILLS & REQUIREMENTS

 - 2+ years in a leadership role

 - 5+ years in engineering

 - 3+ years in building web applications using Node.js and React

 - Experience in architecting software (for projects from scratch is a plus)

 - Experience in setting up and maintaining hosting infrastructure

 - Strong business acumen (experience in early-stage startups is

source_jobs.title: Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

OAK’S LAB is a technology partner that helps startups, scaleups, and enterprises build software solutions by deploying empowered product teams. Our innovative solutions have created market leaders across multiple sectors.

 - Based in the Czech Republic

 - Founded in 2016

 - Built and launched >65 products

 - The combined valuation of our clients is $1.7B



THE ROLE

At OAK'S LAB, design is central to everything we build.

We're offering the perfect blend of support and responsibility: You will be quickly empowered to take full ownership of challenging design initiatives on one of our live products. This isn't theoretical; this is real-world value creation, collaborating with our experienced engineering and product teams.

Your steep learning curve will be fully supported. You’ll be supported by our Head of Design or a Senior Designer through consistent mentorship and coaching. We're looking for someone who loves to experiment, learn, operate on the edge of technology and eager to tackle any challenge, while helping us keep a consistent high bar of quality.

Bring your ambition and a solid portfolio, and join our growing team of 7 talented designers. If you’re ready to showcase your creativity and have a direct impact on the success of the products we build, we want to hear from you.



RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Conceptualize and design digital products, websites, and brands from discovery to delivery

 - Drive product decisions and collaborate closely alongside Tech Leads and Product Managers

 - Conduct user research to understand your users and to validate user personas

 - Craft a beautiful visual direction and translate it consistently across the entire project

 - Ensure adherence to UX/UI standards, elements, patterns, and specifications

 - Contribute to project documentation alongside PMs and manage your design delivery based on project milestones.

 - Explore new approaches, AI technologies and always be ready to learn



SKILLS & REQUIREMENTS

 - Experience in designing digital products

 - A portfolio that demonstrates a eye for aesthetics, a strong taste for visual design, and clear application of UI/UX principles.

 - Fluent in English with strong communication skills to present and effectively advocate for your ideas

 - Interest in visual design, user experience and ideally also branding

 - Experience working with Figma (Adobe Creative Suite is a nice-to-have) and exposure to user/app analytics tools to measure design impact.

 - Strategic and analytical thinking combined with a proactive, collaborative team spirit

 - A genuine interest in tech, emerging AI technologies, product development, and continuous self-improvement.



OUR PROJECTS

We’ve built over 40 successful products. Here are a few from our portfolio:

 - Nasdaq Private Market https://www.nasdaqprivatemarket.com/

 - PlexTrac https://www.oakslab.com/case-studies/plextrac

 - Vette https://www.oakslab.com/case-studies/vette

 - Plotify https://www.oakslab.com/case-studies/plotify

See our design portfolio here. https://dribbble.com/oakslab






Important Notice: OAK'S LAB communication, including interview requests and job offers, are only sent from an "@oakslab.com http://oakslab.com" or "@oaks-lab.com http://oaks-lab.com" email addresses (e.g., john@oakslab.com or john@oaks-lab.com). Any message from a different email domain is not associated with OAK'S LAB. We will never ask for payment information or banking details via email, phone, or any other communication channel during the interview process. If you receive messages using our name, domain, or brand assets in an attempt to impersonate us or act on our behalf, do not engage. Instead, report it to Econsumer.gov http://Econsumer.gov at Government Shutdown Notice / Aviso de cierre del gobierno https://econsumer.gov/ (if you are in the EU), Federal Trade Commission (FTC) at Government Shutdown Notice / Aviso de cierre del gobierno https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/ , or the Securities and

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer (Node&React)
source_jobs.description:
**This is a remote position open to candidates in Europe. For those based in the Czech Republic, a hybrid work model is also available.




ABOUT US

We are a leading product development partner specializing in custom web and mobile application development. With Silicon Valley founders and top-tier European tech talent, we operate from Prague and have successfully delivered over 65 software products for early-stage startups, scaleups, and global enterprises.

 - Founded in 2016

 - Headquartered in Prague

 - Built and launched 65+ products

 - 90+ team members

 - Driving product innovation for leading US companies

At OAK’S LAB, we take an AI-first approach, utilizing AI on almost every project. From streamlining design and testing workflows to enhancing developer productivity, our teams leverage tools such as Figma MCP Server, Playwright MCP Server, and Cursor, and we’re actively experimenting with remote AI agents to push the boundaries of what’s possible in product development.




OUR PROJECTS

Here are a few from our portfolio:

 - Nasdaq Private Market (Series C, Finance)- nasdaqprivatemarket.com http://nasdaqprivatemarket.com

 - Blackpoint Cyber (Series B, Cybersecurity) - blackpointcyber.com http://blackpointcyber.com

 - OpenLoop (Series A, Healthcare) - openloophealth.com http://openloophealth.com




THE ROLE

Our product development team is looking for a Senior Fullstack Engineer who combines creative thinking, exceptional problem-solving skills, and technical expertise to build outstanding web and mobile applications for our clients.

You’ll play a key part in building and scaling impactful digital products from the ground up. You’ll work as part of a dedicated product team alongside a Tech Lead, Product Manager, Designer, and a talented group of engineers, driving the success of innovative companies. Your role will involve everything from participating in high-level technical discussions to engineering and deploying complex features, giving you full ownership across the entire product development lifecycle.

For ambitious engineers, we’ll provide the time, mentorship, and opportunities to step into a leadership role, where you can guide and mentor your own team over the longer term. You’ll also have the opportunity to join our internal AI Guild, a community where engineers share insights, experiment with cutting-edge AI tools, and learn from one another.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Design, develop, and version high-quality web and mobile applications

 - Collaborate with product teams to understand feature requirements and translate them into technical solutions

 - Be accountable for an area of the application, its delivery, production-level quality, and its effective presentation to stakeholders

 - Understand the product and user needs to prioritize business value and functionality

 - Ensure the application meets all requirements of security and scalability

 - Write clean and scalable code

 - Engage in code reviews, provide constructive feedback, mentoring less senior engineers




SKILLS & REQUIREMENTS

 - 5+ years of experience in building web solutions using Node and React

 - Experienced with Javascript/Typescript

 - Focus on code quality

 - Desire to learn new technologies and apply AI in your workflow

 - Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

 - Proactiveness and the capability to make a difference

 - Driven, hard work ethic, showing commitment

 - Ability to work effectively in a team environment, following Agile methodologies

 - Proficient in English

 - Experience with Python is beneficial but not essential




OUR TECH STACK

 - Typescript

 - Node.js

 - React + Next.js

 - React Native

 - GraphQL, tRPC

 - Material UI

 - Playwright

 - PostgreSQL

 - Google Cloud Platform

 - Python

 - HuggingFace API, LLM APIs (eg OpenAI API), Langchain, Vector Databases for RAG

source_jobs.title: Senior Fullstack Engineer (AI Focused)
source_jobs.description:
**This is a remote position open to candidates in Europe and Turkey. For those based in the Czech Republic, a hybrid work model is available.




ABOUT US

We are a leading product development partner specializing in custom web and mobile application development. With Silicon Valley founders and top-tier European tech talent, we operate from Prague and have successfully delivered over 65 software products for early-stage startups, scaleups, and global enterprises.

 - Founded in 2016

 - Headquartered in Prague

 - Built and launched 65+ products

 - 90+ team members

 - Driving product innovation for leading US companies

At OAK’S LAB, we take an AI-first approach, utilizing AI on almost every project. From streamlining design and testing workflows to enhancing developer productivity, our teams leverage tools such as Figma MCP Server, Playwright MCP Server, and Cursor, and we’re actively experimenting with remote AI agents to push the boundaries of what’s possible in product development.




OUR PROJECTS

Here are a few from our portfolio:

 - Nasdaq Private Market (Series C, Finance)- nasdaqprivatemarket.com http://nasdaqprivatemarket.com

 - Blackpoint Cyber (Series B, Cybersecurity) - blackpointcyber.com http://blackpointcyber.com

 - OpenLoop (Series A, Healthcare) - openloophealth.com http://openloophealth.com




THE ROLE

Our product development team is seeking a Senior Full-Stack Engineer who brings creative thinking, problem-solving, and proactive technical expertise to build outstanding web and mobile applications for our clients. You’ll be working on cutting-edge projects, solving challenges that were previously unsolvable without the use of AI

We are specifically looking for engineers who have hands-on experience building AI-driven solutions and integrating AI models into production applications. This includes practical experience working with LLM APIs, AI-powered workflows, retrieval systems, or other AI integrations that deliver meaningful value to end users.

In this role, you will work within a dedicated product team consisting of the Tech Lead for the specific product, a Product Manager, a Designer, and a skilled team of engineers to drive the product’s success. From engaging in technical discussions to engineering complex features, your involvement spans the entire product development lifecycle.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Design scalable, modular, and maintainable architectures for AI-powered applications

 - Collaborate with product teams to understand feature requirements and translate them into technical solutions leveraging AI models

 - Integrate APIs (e.g., LLM APIs (e.g. OpenAI), Hugging Face API) into applications for tasks such as NLP and image recognition

 - Implement prompt engineering, embeddings, and other techniques to customize model outputs without building models from scratch

 - Implement vector databases in Postgres for RAG

 - Use tools like Hugging Face’s Transformers to further customize pre-trained models to suit specific project requirements

 - Optimize server-side logic to ensure efficient querying and integration with AI tools

 - Work with unstructured data (text, images, etc.) and convert it into model-ready formats

 - Validate the output quality from AI models to ensure it aligns with business needs and provides value to end-users



SKILLS & REQUIREMENTS

 - 6+ years in engineering

 - 3+ years of experience in building web solutions using Node.js and React

 - Experienced with Javascript/Typescript

 - Hands-on experience building AI-driven solutions and integrating AI models or AI-powered services into production applications

 - Focus on code quality

 - Desire to learn new technologies

 - Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

 - Proactiveness and the capability to make a difference

 - Driven, hard work ethic, showing commitment

 - Ability to work effectively in a team environment, following Agile methodologies

 - Proficiency in English



TECH STACK

 - TypeScr

source_jobs.title: Social Media Manager & Content Creator
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

OAK’S LAB is a technology partner that helps startups, scaleups, and enterprises build software solutions by deploying empowered product teams. Our innovative solutions have created market leaders across multiple sectors.

 - Based in the Czech Republic

 - Founded in 2016

 - Built and launched >65 products

 - The combined valuation of our clients is $1.7B




ABOUT THE ROLE

You'll be the first person at OAK'S LAB whose full-time job is content. We have more ideas than we can keep up with and more material than we have time to publish: a leadership team that writes weekly, a deep and growing library of technical articles, client stories with real outcomes behind them. What we're missing is someone to create and ship these stories day to day.

You're a social media creator first: social is your craft, and our channels are yours to own, not just fill. A lot of your time goes into making things — filming and editing short-form video, repurposing our team's expertise into social formats, designing day-to-day graphics, writing short-form copy. But you also own the plan behind it: the calendar, the community, why we're posting what we're posting, and what the numbers say about it.

We're looking for proactivity, ideas and genuine enthusiasm for the craft.




WHAT YOU'LL OWN

 - Our LinkedIn company page and Instagram end-to-end: content calendar, creation, publishing, and community engagement

 - Short-form video production: shooting and editing team stories, client outcomes, office life, technical explainers, interviews. You bring the people in our office (including our C-level) into the content

 - Day-to-day graphics for our social channels: working inside the brand system and templates our designer sets

 - Repurposing: turning leadership posts, long-form articles, case studies, and reports into social-native formats so good material doesn't get published once and forgotten

 - Short-form copy: solid captions, carousel copy, video scripts in English

 - Performance tracking: knowing what's working, adjusting, reporting back




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



 - 2–3 years in social and content, with real channel ownership. You've run a calendar and community, made the call on what gets posted and why, and watched the numbers to know what's working.

 - B2B experience, non-negotiable. You've created content for a business or professional audience, ideally in tech or another expertise-led space.

 - Social-native instinct. You think in formats, hooks, and what actually performs on LinkedIn and Instagram. You keep up with what's moving the needle in social.

 - Demonstrable video skills: you shoot, you edit, you ship. iPhone-quality is totally fine and expected. We care more about composition, lighting, pacing, and the story than expensive gear. Show us your work.

 - Solid visual sense: you’ll design daily-volume social graphics working inside existing templates and brand systems. Our designer covers the high-craft work, you cover the volume.

 - Advanced spoken and written English. Our channels run in English, and most of our audience are native English speakers.

 - Organized, self-directed, idea-driven

 - Outgoing and people-oriented: creating content with and around our team means working with our C-level and senior people. You'll need to bring them into the content.

 - Comfortable with the everyday content toolkit: Canva, Figma, Descript, CapCut, or similar. And if you do your best work in something else, we're glad to get you whatever tools help you do the job well.

 - Smart with AI tools as an efficiency layer, but the content is made by you

 - Based in Prague. This role lives in the office 3–4 days a week, because that's where the stories happen.







Important Notice: OAK'S LAB communication, including interview requests and job offers, are only sent from an "@oakslab.com http://oakslab.com" or "@oaks-lab.com http://oaks-lab.com" email addresses (e.g., john@oakslab.com or john@oaks-lab.com). Any message from

source_jobs.title: QA Engineer - Manual
source_jobs.description:
* This position is hybrid, so being located in Prague is essential

* This is a long-term contract engagement




ABOUT US

We are a leading product development partner specializing in custom web and mobile application development. With Silicon Valley founders and top-tier European tech talent, we operate from Prague and have successfully delivered over 65 software products for early-stage startups, scaleups, and global enterprises.

 - Founded in 2016

 - Headquartered in Prague

 - Built and launched 65+ products

 - 90+ team members

 - Driving product innovation for leading US companies




OUR PROJECTS

Here are a few from our portfolio:

 - Nasdaq Private Market (Series C, Finance)- nasdaqprivatemarket.com http://nasdaqprivatemarket.com

 - Blackpoint Cyber (Series B, Cybersecurity) - blackpointcyber.com http://blackpointcyber.com

 - OpenLoop (Series A, Healthcare) - openloophealth.com http://openloophealth.com




THE ROLE

You’ll be responsible for implementing and maintaining the test strategy and test plans, and manually testing the product to ensure seamless e2e experiences. Beyond testing stories, you will be responsible for the overall quality of the product and will ensure that the application functions flawlessly from the users' perspective.

Collaborating closely with our Tech Lead, you'll streamline workflows and help organize releases. You'll be the decision-maker, giving the green light for each release. You’ll collaborate with Engineers to clarify product functionalities and provide them with testing data. Most importantly, you’ll be a partner to the Product Manager, gaining insights into the business and project scope to determine quality assurance priorities and to set effective testing strategies.

If you're highly proactive, well-organized, and passionate about quality products, this position is perfect for you!




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Support the Product Manager with the preparation of the product specification, user stories, business analysis, prioritization, and other project management activities to enhance the team’s velocity

 - Work closely with the Product Manager and Tech Lead to define the test strategy, plan, scenarios, and cases, and collaborate on testing requirements and activities as a core part of the business rollout strategy.

 - Support the engineering team with product and business knowledge and testing data

 - Actively participate in refinement ceremonies, providing estimations (from the QA side) and uncovering edge cases

 - Drive the whole QA process and testing lifecycle

 - Measure and report key quality metrics to the team and stakeholders

 - Drive the product launch checklist documentation




SKILLS & REQUIREMENTS

 - 2+ years of experience in manual testing of web applications

 - Experience with Postman or a similar tool for API testing

 - Highly self-organized, detail-oriented, reliable team player

 - Professional proficiency in English

 - Ability to clearly communicate and efficiently coordinate the team

 - Experience with creating test documentation (test strategy, test plan, test scenarios, and test cases)

 - Strong analytical thinking and ability to uncover edge cases

 - Experience with defining acceptance criteria

 - Ability to provide clear estimations of QA work

 - Experience working independently on a project, as the only QA, is a plus

 - Experience with test automation is a plus (Typescript, Playwright or Cypress)





Important Notice: OAK'S LAB communication, including interview requests and job offers, are only sent from an "@oakslab.com" or "@oaks-lab.com" email address (e.g., john@oakslab.com or john@oaks-lab.com). Any message from a different email domain is not associated with OAK'S LAB. We will never ask for payment information or banking details via email, phone, or any other communication channel during the interview process. If you receive messages using our name, domain, or brand assets in an attempt to impersonate us or act on our behalf,

source_jobs.title: Tech Lead (Node&React) - South Africa
source_jobs.description:
* The position is fully remote and is open to candidates based in South Africa

* The position is for a B2B/freelancing cooperation and it is a long-term contract engagement




ABOUT US

We are a leading product development partner specializing in custom web and mobile application development. With Silicon Valley founders and top-tier European tech talent, we operate from Prague and have successfully delivered over 65 software products for early-stage startups, scaleups, and global enterprises.

 - Founded in 2016

 - Headquartered in Prague

 - Built and launched 65+ products

 - 85+ team members

 - Driving product innovation for leading US companies

At OAK’S LAB, we take an AI-first approach, utilizing AI on almost every project. From streamlining design and testing workflows to enhancing developer productivity, our teams leverage tools such as Figma MCP Server, Playwright MCP Server, and Cursor, and we’re actively experimenting with remote AI agents to push the boundaries of what’s possible in product development.




OUR PROJECTS

Here are a few from our portfolio:

 - Nasdaq Private Market (Series C, Finance)- nasdaqprivatemarket.com http://nasdaqprivatemarket.com

 - Blackpoint Cyber (Series B, Cybersecurity ) - blackpointcyber.com http://blackpointcyber.com

 - OpenLoop (Series A, Healthcare) - openloophealth.com http://openloophealth.com




THE ROLE

Our product development team is looking for an experienced Tech Lead who combines creative thinking, exceptional problem-solving skills, and technical expertise to own the technical buildout of the product. On each of our products, we have a dedicated team that is led by a Tech Lead, a Product Manager, and a Design Lead. Our teams are small and effective and range from 5 to 15 people.

This role requires a combination of strong technical and leadership capabilities. You’ll be responsible for managing an engineering team (usually 3-7 engineers), owning the software architecture and infrastructure, engaging with the business to understand the product needs, and overseeing the technical direction and delivery.

You’ll get support and guidance from our Head of Engineering and will also be part of our Engineering Leads Council, where we consult on large technical challenges and tech-related decisions that shape the startups we build. You’ll also have the opportunity to join our internal AI Guild, a community where engineers share insights, experiment with cutting-edge AI tools, and learn from one another.

RESPONSIBILITIES

Leadership

 - Collaborate with the Product Manager and Design Lead to align on the project’s goals and ensure the delivery of a seamless, performant front-end experience.

 - Lead, mentor, and manage a team of engineers, fostering a collaborative and high-performing team culture

 - Create and maintain an environment where your engineers are motivated, engaged, and constantly improving their skills.

Development

 - Own the technical delivery of the project, ensuring deadlines are met and deliverables align with the client's objectives.

 - Select and update technologies that are most appropriate for the client's needs, ensuring they align with our standards

 - Assist the Product Manager in discovery refinement, ensuring that epics and user stories in the roadmap are refined, estimated, and prioritized in line with business goals

 - Be a hands-on contributor to the project, developing features together with the team

 - Conduct regular code reviews to maintain code quality

 - Oversee the overall software architecture

 - Proactively seek ways to improve the development process and team efficiency



SKILLS & REQUIREMENTS

 - 2+ years in a leadership role

 - 6+ years in engineering

 - 3+ years in building web applications using Node.js and React

 - Experience in architecting software (for projects from scratch is a plus)

 - Experience in setting up and maintaining hosting infrastructure
